listitem.para: a n-by-2 or n-by-3 matrix of doubles, the LHS sampling
a 1-by-1 matrix of booleans, set to true to plot the horizontal and vertical cuts (default=%t)
a 1-by-1 matrix of booleans, set to true to plot the greatest circles without crossing (default=%f). This works only 2D.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Plots a 2D or 3D Latin Hypercube Sampling.

refsection.title: Examples
